title: chrysanthemum ornatum var. ornatum
intro: Chrysanthemum ornatum var. ornatum, also known as the Ornamental Chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to China and Taiwan. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to make medicines, skincare products, and dietary supplements.
